title: HttpEventHandler Object
description: The HttpEventHandler is a client implemented class that can be added as a handler to an HttpEvent.

methods.name: notify
methods.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

notify.title: HttpEventHandler.notify Method
notify.description: The function called by Fusion when the associated event is fired.

parameters.name: eventArgs
parameters.description: Returns an object that provides access to additional information associated with the event.
